== Notes for [[Item:Q106861|Q106861]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Amr_bint_Jundub

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000025099649304

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
